name: TLPCLOSEDELSH
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[TLPCLOSEDELSH] ON [dbo].[TALEPHAREKETLERI]
FOR DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @TD_REF AS INT
DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select D.TD_REF from DELETED D WHERE D.STATUS=0 GROUP BY D.TD_REF
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @TD_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE STATUS=0 AND TD_REF=@TD_REF
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @TD_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;
